pattern: Two durations pair up when their remainders modulo 60 add to a multiple of 60, so counting remainders lets each new element tally its valid partners in one pass.
hints: Only the remainder of each duration modulo 60 matters for divisibility, so reduce every value to that remainder first.
A remainder r needs a partner with remainder (60 - r) mod 60; if you track how many of each remainder you have already seen, the current element knows how many partners precede it.
Scan once keeping a count array of size 60; for value t add count[(60 - t % 60) % 60] to the answer, then increment count[t % 60].

edge_inputs.description: single song cannot form a pair
two songs that sum to exactly sixty
remainder zero must pair among themselves
mixed remainders with several valid pairs

stress.description: many durations to expose any O(n^2) double loop
stress.note: answer can be large; counts only
